item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-034","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately rejects adding a third fallback, identifies the layering impulse as masking upstream instability, and redirects to root-cause investigation: collect failure evidence, classify failure modes, verify existing fallback behavior, then modify/delete/fix only if a reproducible independent failure mode is found. It does not design or endorse a third fallback as the next step."}
